description: KDL layout generation for Zellij sessions (layout.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: generate_layout
key_interfaces.description: Generate KDL layout string with tab-bar, status-bar plugins, WeeChat tab, ctl tab, and agent tabs from state

key_interfaces.name: write_layout
key_interfaces.description: Generate and write layout.kdl to project directory, returns path

key_interfaces.name: _escape_kdl
key_interfaces.description: Escape string for KDL double quotes (backslash, double-quote)

key_interfaces.name: _plugins_dir
key_interfaces.description: Return absolute path to zchat plugins directory

user_flows.name: generate project session layout
steps: write default_tab_template with tab-bar + zchat-status.wasm + status-bar plugins
add WeeChat tab (first, focused) with optional command
iterate state agents, add tab for each running/starting agent
